caregiver:partner_supportive.text: Supportive partner available on weekday evenings and occasional overnight shifts. Can take on childcare duties to free up 20-30 minute windows. Does not push specific wellness approaches but encourages consistency.

caregiver:campus_counseling.text: University counseling service available to student users. Provides one-on-one sessions and crisis referral. Should be surfaced when mood signals suggest professional support would be beneficial. Not a substitute for emergency services.

caregiver:physiotherapist.text: Physiotherapist managing athlete user's knee injury recovery. Has prescribed no weight-bearing for 4 weeks. Plans must remain within physiotherapist's clearance bounds. Next appointment May 9, 2026.

caregiver:gp_doctor.text: General practitioner. Should be referenced when user reports physical symptoms that fall outside the wellness-coaching scope (chest pain, severe breathlessness, acute injury). Not a substitute for emergency services.
